title: At, In, On — Places
description: IN for enclosed spaces. ON for surfaces. AT for specific points or addresses. The three prepositions that never stop showing up.
summary_pt_br: Preposições de lugar: IN (dentro, espaço fechado — in the kitchen, in Brazil), ON (sobre superfície — on the table, on the wall, on the street), AT (ponto específico, endereço — at the door, at school, at 10 Main Street).

scenes.text_en:
'I live IN Brazil, IN a small house, ON Avenida do Mar.
I study AT Amazing School. I meet friends AT the café.
The book is ON the table. The cat is IN the box.'
scenes.text_pt:
'Moro NO Brasil, NUMA casa pequena, NA Avenida do Mar.
Estudo NA Amazing School. Encontro amigos NO café.
O livro está NA mesa. O gato está NA caixa.'

scenes.title: The IN / ON / AT logic
scenes.body_en: IN = enclosed space / country / city. 'in the kitchen, in Brazil, in Rio'. ON = surface / street name / floor. 'on the table, on Main Street, on the 3rd floor'. AT = specific point / address / event. 'at the door, at 10 Main St, at the party, at school/work/home'. TRAP: 'at school' (specific), 'in the school' (inside the building). Both exist.
scenes.body_pt: IN: dentro, país, cidade (in Brazil, in the kitchen). ON: superfície, nome de rua, andar (on the table, on Avenida do Mar). AT: ponto específico, endereço, evento (at the door, at 10 Main St, at school). 'At school' vs 'in the school' — ambos existem, sentidos diferentes.

examples.en: The cat is in the box, on the table, at home.

scenes.title: Meeting at the café
scenes.pt_summary: Preposições de lugar — at, in, on.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hey, where are you right now?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am at the café on Main Street.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nice. Are you inside or on the terrace?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am on the terrace, at a small table.
turns.pt_hint: ON the terrace, AT a small table.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Great. I am in a taxi on my way.
turns.pt: Ótimo. Estou num táxi a caminho.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Ten minutes. I am in heavy traffic.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No worries. I am reading a book.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: OK. See you in a few minutes.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "At, In, On — Places". IN for enclosed spaces. ON for surfaces. AT for specific points or addresses. The three prepositions that never stop showing up. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "At, In, On — Places". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'At, In, On — Places'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "At, In, On — Places".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
